overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a Mercedes truck cabin driving on a snow-covered multi-lane highway in a truck simulation game. The vehicle travels through a winter landscape with heavy snowfall, passing a service station and approaching highway signage while maintaining steady highway speed.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered multi-lane highway through forested area

events.description: red car overtakes on the left side and passes out of view

agents.ego_description: driving steadily in the right lane of the snowy highway, maintaining consistent speed

notable_agents.action: red sedan overtaking the truck on the left lane

multi-lane asphalt highway covered in snow with visible tire tracks
metal safety barrier separating the highway lanes
dense line of pine trees heavily covered in snow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a truck cabin driving on a snow-covered highway. The Mercedes dashboard and decorative interior elements are visible in the foreground. A red car overtakes on the left while snow-covered forests line the right side of the road.

events.description: gas station with blue roof becomes visible on the right side of the highway

agents.ego_description: maintaining highway speed while passing the service station area

entered.detail: blue-roofed service station with fuel pumps and parking area

segments.scene_description: The truck continues along the highway as a gas station appears on the right, marking a transition from the forested area to a more developed service zone. The snow continues to fall steadily as the vehicle passes the station.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway through rural snowy landscape

events.description: highway curves gently to the right through the open countryside

agents.ego_description: navigating gentle curves through the open snowy countryside with fields visible beyond the tree line

notable_agents.action: white truck visible in the distance traveling in the left lane

entered.detail: open agricultural fields blanketed in white snow beyond the roadside trees
scattered deciduous trees along the highway edge covered in snow

segments.scene_description: The highway opens into rural countryside with expansive snow-covered fields visible to the right. The road curves gently while the guardrail passes closer to the vehicle. Sparse trees line the roadside between the highway and the open fields.

events.description: highway signage including speed limit signs and directional markers become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching highway exit signage while maintaining steady speed in the right lane

entered.detail: blue directional signs and circular speed limit signs indicating 120 km/h
highway exit ramp diverging to the right with snow-covered surface

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches an exit interchange as blue highway signs and speed limit markers come into view. The exit ramp diverges to the right while the main highway continues forward. Snow continues to fall as the vehicle nears the decision point for the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it travels from a forested highway through a service zone and into an open rural landscape. It begins with the Mercedes dashboard in the foreground as a red car overtakes the vehicle amidst snow-covered forests. As the truck continues forward, the dense trees give way to a roadside gas station, marking a transition into a more developed service area under a steady snowfall. The scene then expands into the rural countryside, where the road curves gently past guardrails and sparse trees to reveal expansive, snow-covered fields. Finally, the camera approaches a highway interchange, passing blue directional signs and speed limit markers as an exit ramp diverges to the right.
